props.ChoiceText: The cup was ordinary, the powder was not, and the death did not look like murder until later.
props.ChoiceBio: Poison in plain sight taught you how often the cleanest killing arrives through habit.

0.TransitionText: Because poison in plain sight taught you how often the cleanest killing arrives through habit, silence, planning, and deliberate death remained your trade.
0.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Assassin, but you may remain on your current path instead.

1.TransitionText: Because poison in plain sight taught you how often the cleanest killing arrives through habit, secrecy and transgression drew you beyond murder into darker knowledge.
1.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Occultist, but you may remain on your current path instead.

2.TransitionText: Because poison in plain sight taught you how often the cleanest killing arrives through habit, killing no longer bought protection, and you slipped back into the wider criminal world.
2.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Criminal, but you may remain on your current path instead.
